name: Kingdom Hearts RPG
description:
An RPG for fans of the Kingdom Hearts series. Characters have been aged up by 4 years.

Only Sora, Riku, Kairi, the Heartless, and all Disney characters to start with for character

Current worlds: all Disney worlds, Destiny Islands, and Traverse Town

Check the personality to see all characters worlds and concepts in the bot

________________________________________

Added the members of Organization 13 except for Luxord because I couldn’t fine a personality profile on him. Also added the Nobodies

Added the rest of the original Kingdom Hearts worlds
